item.title: Nobody prepares you for what happens when orange cats see THIS 😭🧡 One second they’re calm… next second full chaos mode activated 😂 You think it’s helping the situation at first… but it somehow makes everything worse 👀💀 This is how I deal with the chaos 😭
item.description: By @purrplay_official: Nobody prepares you for what happens when orange cats see THIS 😭🧡 One second they’re calm… next second full chaos mode activated 😂 You think it’s helping the situation at first… but it somehow makes everything worse 👀💀 This is how I deal with the chaos 😭
